title: BCI Feature Envelope v2
description: Minimally processed, NDJSON-safe multimodal BCI feature envelope. v2 adds a discriminated modality union while preserving EEGCanonicalV1 / EEGFeatureContractv1 as the `eeg` branch.

version.description: Semantic version of this envelope instance, e.g., 2.0.0.

schemaref.description: Local schema reference for validation tooling.

windowId.description: Stable identifier for this feature window within a session.

sessionId.description: Locally scoped session identifier. Must not be exported beyond Tier-3 unchanged.

oneOf.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at the center of the window.
Seconds since session start at the center of the window.

samplingRateHz.description: Effective sampling rate in Hz for the primary modality in this window.

windowDurationSec.description: Duration of the window in seconds.

channelLayout.description: Logical channel layout for this window; interpretation is modality-specific but shape is shared.

channels.description: List of logical channel identifiers in acquisition order.

referenceScheme.description: Reference or montage scheme identifier, e.g., 'average', 'linked-ears', 'single-ended'.

notes.description: Optional human-readable description of the montage or sensor placement.

modality.description: Primary modality for this feature window. Determines which modality* block must be present.

eeg.description: EEGCanonicalV1 feature structure. This branch must remain semantically identical to EEGFeatureContractv1 and is used when modality == 'eeg'.

eda.description: EDA-specific feature block, used when modality == 'eda'.

windowType.description: Indicates whether this follows the canonical EDA pipeline or an experimental variant.

tonicLevel.description: Normalized tonic (slow-varying) EDA level for the window.

phasicCount.description: Number of detected phasic responses in this window.

phasicAmplitudeMean.description: Mean amplitude of phasic responses in this window, in normalized units.

artifactFlag.description: True if the window is likely contaminated by artifacts.

hr.description: Heart rate / HRV-specific features, used when modality == 'hr'.

meanHrBpm.description: Mean heart rate in beats per minute for this window.

sdnn.description: Standard deviation of NN intervals (SDNN) in seconds or normalized units.

rmssd.description: Root mean square of successive differences between NN intervals.

artifactFlag.description: True if the window is likely contaminated by artifacts.

breathRateHz.description: Estimated breathing rate in Hz for this window.

amplitude.description: Normalized amplitude of the respiratory signal.

motion.description: Motion / accelerometer-specific features, used when modality == 'motion'.

activityIndex.description: Normalized scalar activity index (e.g., magnitude of acceleration).

stepCount.description: Estimated step count within the window, if applicable.

features.description: Flat feature list for NDJSON analysis and generic tooling. For EEG, these align with EEGFeatureContractv1; for other modalities, they mirror the modality block.

featureId.description: Stable identifier for this feature within the canonical pipeline.

channel.description: Logical channel identifier for channel-specific features, when applicable.

band.description: Band label for spectral features, e.g., 'delta', 'theta', 'alpha', 'beta', 'gamma', 'lf', 'hf'.

value.description: Numeric feature value, typically normalized or log-transformed, but unsmoothed with respect to EMA.

metadata.description: Optional, strictly derived metadata. Must not contain raw samples or PII.

pipelineId.description: Identifier of the canonical pipeline descriptor used, e.g., 'bci-canonical-pipeline-v1'.

deviceLogicalId.description: Logical device ID from EEGDeviceRegistry or similar, not a hardware serial number.
